args.message: Before we talk about a test drive, I need some specifics on ownership and maintenance history. Can you walk me through: (1) How many previous owners has this car had? (2) Do you have complete service records — oil changes, any major repairs, transmission fluid service? (3) Has this car ever been in an accident, and do you have a clean title history? (4) What's the maintenance interval you've actually followed — oil change every 3,000, 5,000, or 10,000 miles?
